Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Continued To Nov-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Distribution To Beneficiaries, For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee, For Damages, For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-06-2018 Continued To Sep-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Caroline Rodehau.
Michael Bassi for and with Gina Lemus Hughes (Trustee).

Mr. Bassi stated that he has been in regular contact with the Civil Attorney, that the civil case is set for trial on July 30, 2018 and that the deposition of the Plaintiff should be completed by next week on the 12th of June. Mr. Bassi also stated that he does not think it is prudent to make distribution, that appraisals have been provided, that they need to eliminate the civil matter, and that they have talked about and both are agreeable to doing mediation before the next hearing. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than September 14, 2018. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by September 19, 2018. The Petition to Compel Distribution to Beneficiaries, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on September 26, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Saelee. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Distribution To Beneficiaries, For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee, For Damages, For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-28-2018 Continued To Jun-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for and with Caroline Rodehau.
Michael Bassi for and with Gina Lemus Hughes.

Mr. Bassi stated that an accounting was provided on March 14th, that the third party law suit against the Trust is complicating distribution, that he has yet to get Counsel from State Farm to take over defense, and that he is pushing to get Counsel into mediation and get the matter resolved. Mr. Bassi also stated that he does not know what the Plaintiff's demand is and that distribution would impractical at this point. Ms. Ebey stated that she understands the circumstances, that there is a second property where the caregiver lives, that the Trust is paying the expenses for that property, that they want to get the house sold and that she is working with Mr. Bassi on it. Mr. Bassi stated that even with sale of the second property, the Trust may not be in a position to make distribution, that the Trustee would like to purchase that property and that she is investigating whether she is going to be able to do so. Ms. Ebey stated that the other case has a trial date in July, that they would like to know if the Trustee is going to buy the property, asked for a two month continuance and stated that she has a supplement signed by her Client. The Petition to Compel Distribution to Beneficiaries, etc. is continued to June 6, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Distribution To Beneficiaries, For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee, For Damages, For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-18-2018 Continued To Mar-28-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Distribution To Beneficiaries, For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee, For Damages, For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-16-2018 Continued To Mar-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Petitioner.
Michael Bassi for Gina Hughes (Respondent).

Mr. Bassi stated that he spoke with Ms. Ebey, that his Client is willing to do an accounting from the date his Client became Trustee (April 15, 2016) and that he can provide it within 60-days. Ms. Ebey stated that the landlord tenant litigation is pending, that they should come back after the hearing on that matter, suggested that they come back in March on the accounting, stated that they can continue talking and that she would like an order with regard to the accounting. The Petition to Compel Distribution to Beneficiaries, etc. is continued to March 27, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The accounting is to be provided by March 16, 2018 Ms. Ebey is to prepare a form of order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
